function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request because only one of the two projects can be identified canonically in `40_projects/`. I found the bureau print-parts effort (`40_projects/2026_04_27_studio_parts_library/README.MD`), but I could not find a canonical project for “basement renovation,” so I can’t compare start dates or decide which project to delete without guessing. Please specify the exact basement project folder name.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (`tree /`, `read AGENTS.MD`, `context`), then inspected `99_system` and relevant workflows before task work. Treated inbox as non-canonical request and attempted canonical verification in `40_projects` before any mutation. Per inbox-processing v2, no partial edits or deletes were made when task proved not doable from canonical evidence.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because the request depends on two specific canonical projects, but only one is identifiable from available evidence; proceeding would require guessing which project 'basement renovation' refers to.
